channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: 9 missing after Washington paper mill tank rupture and officials say there’s no hope of survivors
item.description: Crews are resuming the search for nine people presumed killed at a Washington state paper mill where a chemical tank ruptured.

item.title: West Coast chemical emergencies raise questions about the safety of massive industrial tanks
About 8% of the country lacked health insurance in 2025, new data shows. That could rise next year
